title: OHS Blanket for Dogs, Super Soft Comfy Fleece Throw Blanket Stylish Pet Paw Print Design Sofa Cover Throw Dog Blankets Washable Warm Pet Fleece Blankets, Red - 120 x 150cm
features: Fleece Throw For Pets: Featuring an adorable paw print design, this fleece blanket not only keeps your pet comfortable but also adds a touch of charm and personality to your living space. Perfect for pets with style!

Measuring 120 x 150cm, this fleece blanket is the perfect size for small to medium-sized dogs and cats, providing ample coverage for your pets to snuggle up and enjoy their downtime. Great for homes, travel, and outdoor use.

Versatile & Multi-Purpose: Ideal for use as a sofa cover, pet bed liner, or travel blanket, this versatile pet blanket can be used for dogs, cats and other small pets to provide a comfortable and clean resting place.

Super Soft & Cosy Material: Made from high-quality, ultra-soft fleece, this pet blanket provides maximum comfort and warmth for your furry friends, keeping them cosy whether they’re lounging on the couch or curled up in their bed.

Durable & Washable: Pet blanket is fully machine washable, making it easy to clean and maintain. Simply toss it in the washing machine for a quick refresh, ensuring long-lasting softness and cleanliness after each wash.
description: The OHS Dog Blanket is the ultimate comfort accessory for your furry friend. Made from ultra-soft, high-quality fleece, this 120x150cm blanket provides your pets with a warm, cosy spot to relax, whether on the sofa, in their bed, or while traveling. Featuring a stylish paw print design, it adds a cute and fun touch to your home décor while keeping your pets comfortable. This versatile blanket is perfect for dogs, cats, and other small pets, offering a comfortable and clean space to curl up. Not only is it super soft and warm, but it’s also fully washable for easy cleaning and long-lasting use. The durable, machine-washable fabric ensures that your pet’s favourite blanket stays soft and fresh after every wash. Ideal for keeping your furniture protected from pet hair, dirt, and scratches, the OHS Dog Blanket is a must-have for pet owners looking to add comfort and style to their home. Brand: OHS Size: 120 x 150cm Colour: Red Material: 100% Polyester Pattern: Paw Print Washing Instructions: Machine washable
